calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2003 Vacated

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Jul-15-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Appearances:
Donald S. Friedman, Esq. for Plaintiff Marcos Torres, the guardian ad litem for Brenda Torres a minor.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $16,771.17
Reimbursement of legal/Costs to attorney $4,843.24
Attorney's fees: $4,771.17
A net balance of $7,156.76 to be deposited into a blocked account until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Oct-21-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Set For Trial On Jul-28-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-08-03 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 305
